/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT, MOTION FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION/X: ATTORNEY RICHARD SHIKMAN RETAINED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 02-28-22/CONTD:DEFENSE MOTION FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION ON 01-12-22 IN S22/DOP/CONTD: PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE ON 01-25-22 IN S23/SB: 2 HOURS/ /CONTD: TRIAL ON 02-17-22 IN S22/DOP/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIM HRG, CONTD/X:A COMPLETE LISTING OF ALL EXHIBITS MAYBE FOUND IN THE CASE DOCKET/X:SERGEANT VICTOR HUI, PREVIOUSLY SWORN,RESUMES CROSS-EXAMINATION/EXHMA:PEO-39, TWO-PAGE DOCUMENT ENTITLED EXECUTIVE ORDER N-21-21  EXTENDING THE ORIGINAL 03-04-20 EXECUTIVE ORDER DECLARING A STATE OF EMERGENCY TO EXIST IN CALIFORNIA AS A RESULT OF THE THREAT OF COVID-19 TO 03-31-22/ /X:THE PEOPLE REQUEST THE COURT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THEDOCUMENT DEPICTED IN PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 39, IN EVIDENCE/X:PEOPLE'S REQUESTFOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF PEOPLE;S EXHGIBIT 39 IS GRANTED,/X:COUNSEL FOR THEDEFENSE MAKES A PC 17(B) MOTION FOR ALL COUNTS/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/HTA1:2,3 AND 4/871D:1/DEF:SHALL REMAIN OUT OF CUSTODY ON $5K POSTED BAIL/X:THECOURT ADMONISHES DEFENDANT THAT ALL PREVIOUS ORDERS ISSUED IN THIS CASE REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIM HRG CONTINUED/X:DUE TO THE HIGH VOLUME OF EXHIBITSIN THIS MATTER, ALL EXHIBITS MARKED OR MARKED AND ADMITTED ARE CONSOLIDATEDIN THE PRELIMINARY HEARING EXHIBIT LIST LOCATED IN THE CASE DOCKET/X:OFFICER JOSEPH MAJESKI, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,PREVIOUSLY SWORN, CONTINUES DIRECT EXAMINATION, VIA ZOOM VIDEO,/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER WORRELL, SANFRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/X:OFFICER JOSEPH MAJESKI IS RECALLED BY THE PEOPLE TO CLARIFY PRIOR TESTIMONY, OFFICER MAJESKI TESTIFIES VIA ZOOM,/WITSWORN DA:OFFICER JASON GALVEZ, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/WIT SWORN DA:SERGEANT VICTOR HUI, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/DEFT WV CPX/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING CONTINUED/X:DUE TO THE VOLUMINOUS EXHIBITS, ALL EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE ARE RECORDED IN THE PRELIMINARY HEARING EXHIBIT LIST WHICH MAY BE FOUND IN THE CASE DOCKET, ALTERNATIVELY, THE LIST OF EXHIBITS IS ALSO AVAILABLEIN THE DEPARTMENT 19 FOLDER ON THE  N  DRIVE/X:OFFICER GARY KUNABOOT, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TAKES THE STAND TO CONTINUE CROSS-EXAMINATON BY DEFENSE COUNSEL,/WIT SWORN DA:ZUHAL WEBER, ASSET PROTECTION MANAGER FOR LOUIS VUITTON, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JOHN GARDENER, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/WIT SWORN DA:CIVILIAN YER VUE, OPERATIONS MANAGER, LOUIS VUITTON, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JOSEPH MAJEWSKI, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/DEFT WV CPX/CONTD:FURTHER BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
